body:
### Distinct Failure
On mobile devices in portrait mode, the screen width is often too narrow to display the folder popout (submenu) to the right of the Start Menu. As a result, the submenu goes off-screen and is not fully visible.

### Expected Behavior
The folder popout should display on top of the Start Menu (or be repositioned to fit within the viewport) on mobile devices, ensuring full visibility. Desktop behavior should remain unchanged.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the application on a mobile device (or mobile emulation) in portrait mode.
2. Open the Start Menu.
3. Tap on a folder (e.g., "Programs").
4. Observe that the submenu opens to the side and is cut off by the screen edge.

### Environment
- Device: Mobile (Portrait)
title: [Bug]: Start Menu folder popout cut off on mobile portrait
